SEARCH
Package com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.manager

Class BankNoteManager

java.lang.Object
com.krishcpatel.realm.economy.manager.BankNoteManager
public final class BankNoteManager extends Object
Handles issuing and redeeming physical banknotes.

This manager coordinates bank balance changes, note persistence, ledger recording, and item creation/validation.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

    Creates a bank note manager.

  • Constructor Details

    • BankNoteManager

      public BankNoteManager(Core core, DatabaseManager db, EconomyRepository economy, LedgerRepository ledger, BankNoteRepository notes)
      Creates a bank note manager.
      Parameters:
      core - plugin instance used for events and logging
      db - database manager
      economy - repository used for account balances
      ledger - repository used for ledger entries
      notes - repository used for note persistence

  • Method Details

    • issueNote

      public BankNoteIssueResult issueNote(String playerUuid, long amount) throws SQLException
      Withdraws money from a player's bank balance and creates a bank note record.

      The actual item must be granted on the server thread by calling giveIssuedNote(Player, String, long).

      Parameters:
      playerUuid - player account UUID
      amount - amount to convert into a note
      Returns:
      issue result describing success/failure and created note id
      Throws:
      SQLException - if database access fails

    • redeemHeldNote

      public TransactionResult redeemHeldNote(UUID playerUuid) throws Exception
      Redeems the banknote currently held in the player's main hand.

      The note is validated, marked as redeemed in the database, and the corresponding amount is added back to the player's bank balance. A ledger entry is also recorded.

      Parameters:
      playerUuid - player redeeming the banknote
      Returns:
      result describing whether the redemption succeeded
      Throws:
      Exception - if database or sync inventory operations fail

    • giveIssuedNote

      public void giveIssuedNote(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, String noteId, long amount)
      Grants an already-issued bank note item to a player.

      Must be called from the server thread.

      Parameters:
      player - recipient
      noteId - unique note id
      amount - note value

    • isBankNote

      public boolean isBankNote(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Checks whether the provided item is a valid banknote item.
      Parameters:
      item - item to test
      Returns:
      true if the item is a banknote

    • getNoteId

      public String getNoteId(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Returns the unique banknote id stored in the item metadata.
      Parameters:
      item - banknote item
      Returns:
      note id, or null if the item is not a valid banknote
